rationale: A teacher's grading app needs to be highly tactile, frictionless, and reduce cognitive load. By combining soft pastel zones (calming, clear organization) with Neo-Brutalist elements (hard borders, distinct shadows), the student cards feel like physical flashcards, making the swiping action highly satisfying and precise.

layout_spacing.app_container: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden bg-stone-50 touch-none select-none flex flex-col
layout_spacing.header: h-20 px-8 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0
layout_spacing.grading_area: flex-1 relative w-full h-full p-4 sm:p-8 flex items-center justify-center
layout_spacing.grade_cell: flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-black text-xl sm:text-2xl rounded-2xl transition-all duration-200

student_card.container: relative z-40 w-[280px] sm:w-[340px] aspect-[3/4] bg-white border-2 border-stone-900 rounded-3xl shadow-[8px_8px_0_0_#1c1917] flex flex-col overflow-hidden touch-none
student_card.info_area: h-32 p-6 flex flex-col justify-center items-center bg-white text-center

buttons.primary: px-8 py-4 bg-stone-900 text-white font-bold rounded-xl border-2 border-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-800 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#a8a29e] transition-all active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: px-6 py-3 bg-white text-stone-900 font-bold rounded-xl border-2 border-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-100 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#1c1917] transition-all active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none
buttons.undo: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white border-2 border-stone-900 rounded-full font-bold text-stone-900 hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0_0_#1c1917] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-0.5 transition-all

upload_zone.container: w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-20 aspect-video rounded-3xl border-4 border-dashed border-stone-300 bg-white/50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 hover:border-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer

badges.system: px-3 py-1 bg-stone-200 text-stone-700 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.progress: px-4 py-2 bg-white border-2 border-stone-900 rounded-full font-mono font-bold text-stone-900 shadow-[2px_2px_0_0_#1c1917]

interaction_rules.drag_threshold: Card must be dragged at least 100px towards an edge to register a nearest-cell highlight. Upon release in an active zone, the grade is assigned.
interaction_rules.snap_back: If released before hitting the threshold, the card springs back to the exact center.
interaction_rules.undo: Hitting 'Rückgängig' instantly reverses the exit animation of the previous card and decrements the progress index.
interaction_rules.responsive_edges: On iPad Landscape, grade cells are distributed along the left, right, top, and bottom screen boundaries. On Portrait, they are tightly clustered in a ring around the card area.
interaction_rules.accessibility: Provide haptic feedback (navigator.vibrate) when a cell becomes active, and when a grade is successfully dropped.

1_import.title: .idoceo Importieren
1_import.description: Drag & drop zone for .idoceo files. Once dropped, parse and show summary (e.g., 'Klasse 10B - 21 Schüler').

2_class_list.title: Klasse Auswählen
2_class_list.description: Grid of classes. Each card shows Class Name, Student Count, and Grade System Badge ('0-15 Punkte' or '1-6 Noten').

3_grading_swipe.title: Bewerten
3_grading_swipe.description: The main view. Fullscreen, no scrolling. Top header with Back, Progress (e.g., '1 / 21'), and Undo. Center has the draggable student card. Edges have the 16 cells.

4_summary_export.title: Zusammenfassung
4_summary_export.description: List of all students and their assigned grades. Huge 'Als CSV Exportieren' primary button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for the swipe card. Bind 'x' and 'y' drag offsets using useMotionValue.
Calculate the distance from the card center to all 16 grade cells dynamically during 'onDrag'. The closest cell (if within a set distance threshold) becomes the 'active' cell.
Map the 16 grade values perfectly to the 4 edges. Group them arrays of 4 (top, right, bottom, left).
The UI is purely German. Use terms like 'Importieren', 'Klasse Auswählen', 'Rückgängig', 'Zusammenfassung', 'Als CSV Exportieren'.
Disable native scrolling and bouncing on the grading screen with 'touch-none', 'overflow-hidden', and 'overscroll-none'.
Ensure large hit areas. The entire screen acts as a canvas for the drag. The grade cells themselves are visual targets.

Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the layout; no Shadcn components are required for the heavily custom swipe interface, but Shadcn can be used for the upload/export summaries if customized with the Neo-brutalist hard borders.
